title: memecylon deminutum
intro: Memecylon deminutum, also known as the small-fruited memecylon, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, Memecylon deminutum is often combined with other herbs to make teas, infusions, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
